---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this SDK
title: ''
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of the problem. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Use Case**
Describe the real-world use case this feature would enable.

**Impact**
- [ ] Critical - needed for production
- [ ] High - important for specific use case
- [ ] Medium - nice to have
- [ ] Low - would be a nice improvement

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
